title: Robotics Technology at JPL
description: A gallery of different robot types and technologies under development at JPL for the exploration of our solar system.
text:
RobotCategory: Robot.|RoboticsCategory: Robotics.
EELS (Exobiology Extant Life Surveyor)
A versatile, snake-like robot designed for exploration of previously inaccessible terrain .
July 24, 2023
RobotCategory: Robot.|RoboticsCategory: Robotics.
Rollocopter
An innovative robot that can either roll or fly .
Nov. 1, 2020
RobotCategory: Robot.|RoboticsCategory: Robotics.
A-PUFFER
A foldable robot that can access tight spaces .
Sept. 30, 2020
RobotCategory: Robot.|RoboticsCategory: Robotics.
RoMan
A powerful robot designed to work in real-world environments .
Sept. 1, 2020
RobotCategory: Robot.|RoboticsCategory: Robotics.
NeBula-Husky
A platform for testing autonomous exploration capabilities in underground environments .
Feb. 27, 2020
RobotCategory: Robot.|RoboticsCategory: Robotics.
LLAMA
A fast-moving legged robot that can traverse challenging environments .
Aug. 23, 2018
RobotCategory: Robot.|RoboticsCategory: Robotics.
RoboSimian
This is RoboSimian, an ape-like robot that traverses complex terrain and performs dexterous tasks. .
Sept. 27, 2015
